properties.Test Case: Quit Bloom from each tab. Make sure no changes are lost quitting from edit tab.

properties.Test Case: Smoke Test Collection Dropdown Menu items.

properties.Test Case: Make an RTL book (Settings:Book making: special script settings). Note: this does not make roman text go RTL. Instead it changes the page order (in ePUB only) and justification of text. For this test, you can type English (which will show LTR), and yet still validate that other things are ordered and justified correctly.
properties.Steps: - Make an RTL book (Settings:Book making: special script settings). Note: this does not make roman text go RTL.
